name: NAMOR
description: The unrivaled King of the Seas, Namor surfs into battle on a mighty wave with an army of fierce aquatic creatures in his wake. When ancient horns of war blare, devastation soon follows as deadly waters engulf the arena.
lore: Born of a union between a human and an Atlantean, Namor has always been a man of two worlds. But while he proudly rules those who dwell beneath the waves, those who live on the surface have long earned Namor's ire. After decades of simmering tension, Namor has finally decided that the time is right to strike at the surface world. He has sought the aid of his Mutant allies living in the future on Krakoa to aid him as he sets his sights on a new prize: Jeju Island.

abilities.name: Trident of Neptune
abilities.description: Throw the trident forward, reducing Aquatic Dominion's cooldown upon enemy impact. Critical hits cause Monstro Spawn to enter a berserk state, gaining increased Attack Speed

abilities.name: Horn of Proteus
abilities.description: Summon Giganto to leap atop enemies within range, disabling their mobility abilities

stats.Range: A cylindrical spell field with an inner circle radius of 3.5m, an outer circle radius of 9m, and a height of 3m
stats.Damage: Inner Circle Damage: 500; Outer Circle Damage: 180

abilities.name: Blessing of the Deep
abilities.description: Summon a protective barrier while flying upwards

abilities.name: Aquatic Dominion
abilities.description: Summon a Monstro Spawn that can autonomously attack enemies

stats.Casting: Arced Trajectory (Summon Monstro Spawn), Direct Hit (Monstro Spawn)
stats.Monstro Spawn Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 20m, decreasing to 30% at 40m

abilities.name: Wrath of the Seven Seas
abilities.description: Launch the trident forward to damage nearby enemies, then direct all Monstro Spawn to perform an enhanced attack on the nearest hit enemy. When the trident hits an enemy, Monstro Spawn to enter a berserk state, gaining increased Attack Speed

stats.Casting: Arced projectile that generates a spell field upon impact

received.name: TIDAL DIRGE
received.description: Hela channels energy of the undead to empower Namor. When Namor strikes with his trident, a spectral water column erupts at the target area, slowing enemies hit. Whenever Hela or Namor assist in a KO, an invulnerable Undead Monstro spawns at the fallen enemy's position, automatically attacking the nearest foe for a short time before vanishing

stats.Inner Circle Spell Field Range: A cylindrical spell field with a radius of 3m and a height of 13m
stats.Outer Circle Spell Field Range: A cylindrical spell field with a radius of 6m and a height of 11m
stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 20m, decreasing to 50% at 40m

base.description: Summon an extra Gamma Monstro that continuously damages the nearest enemy. Upon landing critical hits, the Gamma Monstro gains increased Attack Speed. Hitting an enemy with Wrath of the Seven Seas prompts it to fire a powerful beam.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Hulk, casting Blessing of the Deep creates a water barrier infused with Gamma energy. Standing inside accelerates the Gamma Monstro cooldown and grants it a Damage Boost.

base.description: Gain a new ability to summon a Frost Tide forward. The wave damages, Pushes Back, and inflicts a Slow on all enemies hit.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Luna Snow, the Frost Tide gains 1 charge and crashes down upon reaching its maximum range, dealing area damage and Slowing enemies caught near the endpoint.
